component.name: Compressr
component.summary: Compressr is a free and open source image compression tool that can be used to reduce the file size of images without losing quality.

description.p: Compressr is a free and open source image compression tool that can be used to reduce the file size of images without losing quality.

It supports a wide range of image formats, including JPEG, PNG, GIF, and WebP. Compressr uses advanced algorithms to compress images while maintaining their quality. It also has a user-friendly interface that makes it easy to use for both beginners and advanced users.
